film.title: Balls Out
film.overview: With marriage, graduation, and the real world looming on the horizon, fifth year senior Caleb Fuller reassembles the ol' team of misfits for one last epic run in Intramural football.

dialogues.dialogue: - Barry-- - Father Walsh.  - Barry-- - She just-- she pushed me.  I couldn't help it. Shame on you.  - Barry-- - It was Whitesnake.  - Barry-- - ♪ Here I go again on my own... ♪
I've told her this since she was 14,  "You need to put on makeup, nice dresses,  show some pride, Iike Jennifer."  Leave her alone, Mom.  Let's ask Barry.
